scientific_question: Do species co-occur more than expected after prevalence, effort, season, and checklist richness are controlled?
design_terms: stratified null permutations; Jaccard; phi; odds ratio; prevalence- and richness-preserving randomization
supports_hypothesis_if: positive excess association strengthens during spawn/egg periods or near rings
main_limitations: shared habitat and residual reporting bias do not prove social attraction

scientific_question: Which species share herring responses and which remain conditionally associated after environmental adjustment?
design_terms: species-specific event-time/distance/intensity effects; effort; observer; location; event; year; multiple latent factors
supports_hypothesis_if: community-level herring response plus stable residual association structure

scientific_question: Does the bird community become more connected, clustered, or guild-structured near spawn?

scientific_question: At repeatedly sampled localities, can a latent time series isolate the resource pulse from noisy checklist observations?

model_family: event isolation and regional resource-dilution model
scientific_question: Are birds more concentrated at isolated events or diluted among many simultaneous spawns?
design_terms: event response × nearest-event distance × concurrent event count × regional spawn total/rank
